name: update_entry
description: Update an existing content entry by its ID. Unlike Storyblok, Strapi supports partial updates -- you only need to include the fields you want to change in the 'data' object. Omitted fields remain unchanged. For relation fields, providing an ID or array of IDs replaces the existing relations entirely. Returns the updated entry.

parameters.name: content_type
parameters.description: The pluralized API name of the content type (e.g., 'articles', 'products').

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the entry to update.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Object containing only the fields to update. Omitted fields are not modified. For relations, provide the new ID(s) to replace existing relations.

data.title: Getting Started with Strapi v5
